data.title: AEP Names Adrian Rodriguez President and COO of AEP Texas
data.description: Adrian Rodriguez has been appointed as the president and chief operating officer of AEP Texas by American Electric Power (Nasdaq: AEP) to enhance regulatory and stakeholder engagement in Texas. The announcement was made on March 6, 2026, indicating Rodriguez's expertise will further support the company's growth initiatives in the region. This strategic decision reflects AEP's commitment to bolstering operations in Texas, showcasing the importance of experienced leadership.

data.title: Enerpac Tool Group Schedules Second Quarter Fiscal 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
data.description: In Milwaukee on March 06, 2026, Enerpac Tool Group Corp. stated that they will unveil their earnings for the second quarter of fiscal 2026 following the market closure on March 25, 2026. The company's management will host a conference call on March 26, 2026, starting at 8:30 a.m. ET / 7:30 a.m. CT to review the results. Enerpac Tool Group Corp. is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol EPAC.

data.title: 14th Maryland International Film Festival-Hagerstown Will Present Donations to Two Nonprofits on March 26th Opening Night! Children In Need and America's VetDogs Being Recognized
data.description: In HAGERSTOWN, Maryland, the Maryland International Film Festival-Hagerstown's red-carpet opening night awards and screenings event on March 6, 2026 will feature donations to two notable nonprofits. During the ceremony, Children In Need and America's VetDogs will be recognized for their impactful work. This event will serve as an opportunity to shine a spotlight on their efforts and receive contributions that will aid them in their missions.

data.title: FIT KING Reinforces Long-Term Commitment to Inclusive Performance at CAF's "Defying Limits" Los Angeles Gala
data.description: In Los Angeles on March 6, 2026, FIT KING announced its collaboration with the Challenged Athletes Foundation (CAF) to back the first Defying Limits Los Angeles Gala. The event managed to raise over $600,000 aimed at broadening the reach of adaptive sports and athletic opportunities.FIT...

data.title: REI celebrates Member Month with fresh rewards, new gear and $200 million in Co-op Member Rewards
data.description: In Seattle on March 6, 2026, REI is observing Member Month this March, offering exclusive deals, product releases, and more to its 25 million co-op members. During this limited-time event, members can access special rewards and new gear arrivals, enhancing the value of their membership.

data.title: Kira Works with Anthropic to Use AI to Generate Complete Courses and Power Precise Skills Measurement for Personalized Learning
data.description: Kira, a company specializing in AI-native Operating System for Education, and Anthropic, an AI safety company behind Claude, have partnered to revolutionize the utilization of AI in education. This integration aims to establish a groundbreaking approach in developing courses, evaluating skills, and implementing tailored interventions in K–12, higher education, and workforce training. By incorporating Claude into Kira’s platform, the collaboration enables the creation of entire courses, like the 9th Grade Biology curriculum, setting a new industry standard for AI integration in educational technology.

data.title: PerfectQuote and Sana Benefits Announce Partnership to Market Sana Level-Funded Medical Plans through PerfectQuote's Benefits Quoting Platform
data.description: Austin, TX - On March 6, 2026, PerfectQuote, Inc. revealed a fresh collaboration with Sana Benefits, Inc. ("Sana"). This partnership aims to grant PerfectQuote customers direct entry to Sana's assortment of group health digital quotes and distribution services. PerfectQuote, Inc. is the prominent platform for group health digital quoting and distribution.
